mapper.insert: INSERT INTO award_application ( competition_id, team_id, student_id, project_name, award_quantity, award_person_count, contact, competition_level, award_rank, award_level, award_time, application_status, create_time, application_number ) VALUES ( #{competitionId}, #{teamId}, #{studentId}, #{projectName}, #{awardQuantity}, #{awardPersonCount}, #{contact}, #{competitionLevel}, #{awardRank}, #{awardLevel}, #{awardTime}, #{applicationStatus}, #{createTime}, #{applicationNumber} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM award_application ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT competition_id, competition_name, award_rank FROM competition WHERE competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY competition_name
SELECT competition_id, competition_name, award_rank FROM competition ORDER BY competition_name

SELECT file_id as fileId, application_id as applicationId, file_name as fileName, file_path as filePath, file_type as fileType, file_size as fileSize, upload_time as uploadTime FROM application_file WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY upload_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team (name, leader_id, competition_id, has_sort, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{leaderId}, #{competitionId}, #{hasSort}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT tm.team_member_id as teamMemberId, tm.team_id as teamId, tm.external_name as externalName, tm.external_school as externalSchool, tm.external_number as externalNumber, tm.is_leader as isLeader, tm.sort_order as sortOrder, s.student_number as studentNumber, s.student_name as studentName, s.college as college FROM team_member tm LEFT JOIN student s ON tm.student_id = s.student_id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY tm.sort_order

SELECT student_id as studentId, student_number as studentNumber, student_name as studentName, grade, major, class_name as className, college FROM student WHERE student_number = #{studentNumber} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, application_id as applicationId, teacher_name as teacherName, teacher_department as teacherDepartment, teacher_no as teacherNo FROM application_teacher WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY id
